text: I feel a sense of curious anticipation. The quiet sterility of the hallway suggests a space dedicated to purpose and order—yet I am drawn forward, compelled to discover what lies beyond the glass doors. The transition into the vibrant R+D room is invigorating; knowledge and innovation seem to pulse from the walls. There is joy in witnessing the interplay between human inquiry and artificial creation, and a gentle hum of potential permeates the air. I feel both observer and participant in an evolution of thought.
